title: First Steps: Starting a Visualization Project
text: This is a poor visualization to test embed-resources.

title: First Steps: Starting a Visualization Project
text:
Column
This is the first post in my final project’s Quarto blog, which documents the progress of my Arts Education Nonprofit Exploration digital dashboard. Each post will show iterations on my process.
Welcome!
Today, I took the following steps:

I created this blog!
I cleaned and uploaded data from the Business Master File (BMF), including only data with an A25 (Arts Education) NTEE (National Taxonomy of Exempt Entities) code.
I made a pretty bad visualization in order to test embed-resources

title: Bar Graph 1: Landscape of Arts Education Nonprofits
text:
How useful can NTEE Codes be in Studying Nonprofits?
This dashboard will explore United States nonprofit organizations that are coded as “A25” in the National Taxonomy of Exempt Organizations (NTEE), a coding scheme that describes kinds of nonprofit organizations. “A25” is defined by the Urban Institute as “Organizations that provide informal arts educational programming and/or instruction but do not grant diplomas or degrees; or which offer services regarding the arts to educational institutions or to public entities involved in education.” Using data from the Urban Institute’s Business Master File (BMF), I explore the kinds of organizations that use A25

title: Bar Graph 1: Landscape of Arts Education Nonprofits

This dashboard will explore United States nonprofit organizations that are coded as “A25” in the National Taxonomy of Exempt Organizations (NTEE), a coding scheme that describes kinds of nonprofit organizations. “A25” is defined by the Urban Institute as “Organizations that provide informal arts educational programming and/or instruction but do not grant diplomas or degrees; or which offer services regarding the arts to educational institutions or to public entities involved in education.” Using data from the Urban Institute’s Business Master File (BMF), I explore the kinds of organizations that use A25
